mapper.select:
SELECT al.id ,al.adjuster_name ,al.submit_time ,al.security_short_name ,al.security_code ,al.adjust_batch_no ,dst.category_type ,COALESCE(wci.s_info_compname, bi.issuer, al.security_short_name) AS issuer ,al.adjust_type ,al.adjust_mode ,al.target_pool_id ,COALESCE(al.target_pool_name, p.pool_name) AS target_pool_name ,al.audit_status FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = al.target_pool_id AND p.pool_type IN ('forbidden', 'observe', 'blacklist') LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = al.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rrs_securityinfo bi ON bi.wind_code = al.security_code LEFT JOIN ais_inv_ods.wind_cbondissuer wci ON wci.s_info_compcode = al.security_code AND wci.used = 1 AND al.security_type = 'company'
al.is_deleted = 0
AND 1 = 0
AND al.target_pool_id IN
#{poolId}
AND (wci.s_info_compcode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyCode}, '%') OR bi.issuer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyCode}, '%'))
AND COALESCE(wci.s_info_compname, bi.issuer) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%')
AND al.security_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND al.security_short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityShortName}, '%')
AND al.submit_time >= #{adjustTimeStart}
AND al.submit_time <= CONCAT(#{adjustTimeEnd}, ' 23:59:59')
AND al.adjuster_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adjusterName}, '%')
AND al.adjust_mode = #{adjustMode}
AND al.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY al.submit_time DESC ,al.id DESC
